default.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ĩs̃ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽs̃ s̃ũs̃t̃ãĩñẽd̃ c̃õñt̃r̃õl̃ ãc̃r̃õs̃s̃ ĩt̃s̃ d̃ũr̃ãt̃ĩõñ. ⟧⟧

long_duration.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ l̃ẽñg̃t̃h̃ õf̃ t̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ p̃l̃ãc̃ẽs̃ ẽm̃p̃h̃ãs̃ĩs̃ õñ c̃õñs̃ĩs̃t̃ẽñc̃ỹ õṽẽr̃ t̃ĩm̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

fatigue_building.text: ⟦⟦ S̃ũs̃t̃ãĩñẽd̃ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ c̃ãñ g̃r̃ãd̃ũãl̃l̃ỹ b̃ũĩl̃d̃ f̃ãt̃ĩg̃ũẽ. ⟧⟧

consistency_focus.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ f̃ãṽõr̃s̃ s̃t̃ẽãd̃ỹ p̃l̃ãỹ r̃ãt̃h̃ẽr̃ t̃h̃ãñ s̃h̃õr̃t̃ p̃ẽãk̃ b̃ũr̃s̃t̃s̃. ⟧⟧
